title: Quote of the day by Kate Middleton: "People often ask me why I am so interested in the mental health of children and young people. The answer is…" - a powerful message on childhood mental health and why early support can shape a lifetime
summary_full: Kate Middleton emphasizes that every child deserves the best possible start in life.  This involves nurturing emotional well-being, not just addressing crises.  Early years are vital for developing trust and security in children.  Children often show distress indirectly, requiring adult awareness and patience.  Providing emotional foundations helps children face life's challenges with confidence.
